data.job_description: We are hiring a Senior Microbiologist for our QC group in Bangalore. Responsibilities: perform sterility testing per USP <71> and EP, environmental monitoring of cleanrooms class 100 and class 10000, bioburden and endotoxin LAL testing, microbial identification using VITEK and 16S rRNA. Must have strong knowledge of GMP, GLP, CAPA, deviation handling, OOS investigation, ICH Q2 method validation. Experience with growth promotion, media preparation, aseptic technique mandatory. 5+ years pharmaceutical or biopharma QC experience required.

QC Microbiologist II role supporting monoclonal antibody manufacturing. Daily activities include bioburden testing, endotoxin LAL, environmental monitoring, aseptic process simulations (media fill), microbial identification, growth promotion testing. GMP compliance, CAPA authorship, root cause analysis. Strong USP/EP knowledge, sterility assurance experience preferred. ISO 13485 awareness a plus. Cleanroom Class 5 and Class 7 exposure mandatory.

Microbiologist for our parenteral injectables site. Will execute sterility tests, environmental monitoring, water system monitoring (purified water, WFI), method validation. Strong understanding of USP <71>, <61>, <62>, EP 2.6.1, CAPA, OOS, deviation management. Aseptic gowning qualification, cleanroom Class 100 hands-on. Liaise with USFDA, MHRA auditors. 4+ years in regulated pharma.

Microbiology QC role for OSD facility. Activities: microbial limits testing (MLT) per USP <61>/<62>, endotoxin (LAL), bioburden, environmental monitoring, water testing. CAPA, OOS investigations, deviation handling, change controls. ICH Q2 method validation. VITEK identification preferred. Cleanroom monitoring Class 10000 and Class 100000.

Senior Microbiology Scientist for biopharma QC. Lead sterility testing, environmental monitoring, bioburden, endotoxin LAL, growth promotion, microbial identification (VITEK, 16S rRNA, MALDI-TOF). GMP, GLP, USP, EP compliance. ICH Q2 validation. Strong CAPA, OOS, deviation handling. Mentor junior microbiologists. Cleanroom Class 5 and Class 7.

Research microbiologist for genomics startup. Bench experience with bacterial culture, 16S rRNA sequencing, NGS sample prep, BSL-2 work. Python or R scripting a plus. Collaborate with bioinformatics team. PhD or MSc with 2+ years experience. Not a regulated GMP role.

Analyst role in microbiology lab. Routine plate counts, sterility, bioburden, water testing. Maintain culture collection. Media preparation. Aseptic technique. USP, EP exposure. GMP environment. CAPA documentation. Reports to senior microbiologist. 1-3 years experience.

Validation Lead - Microbiology QC. Drive method validation per ICH Q2(R1), USP <1225>. Lead CAPA closure for sterility OOS. Environmental monitoring program ownership, cleanroom qualification Class 5/7/8. Author technical reports for regulatory inspections (USFDA, MHRA, ANVISA). Mentor and train microbiology analysts. 7+ years biopharma QC experience.
